outlook_paragraph: Matador Resources operates with full exposure to the Permian Basin, where satellite data as of April 2024 shows only 8 active drilling sites, a sharp decline of 3.5 relative to the recent average. With just half of the active sites showing continuous operation and the remainder newly active, operational consistency appears weakened. Despite a relatively strong WTI environment averaging $93.55/bbl and realized prices at a 92% discount factor, the subdued and unstable drilling pattern suggests constrained production growth into Q1 2024. The deterministic revenue forecast stands at $714.1M, reflecting this cautious activity backdrop.
